info.title: ATLAS — Market Intelligence Engine
info.description: Jhaveri Intelligence Platform — Market → Sector → Stock → Decision

get.description: Get all stocks grouped by sector with technicals and RS.
Get market breadth and regime data.
Get top RS momentum gainers and losers.
Get complete deep-dive for a stock with conviction pillars.
Get RS score history for a stock.

post.description: Execute a UQL query. V1 supports entity_type='equity' only.

get.description: List decisions, optionally filtered by symbol or action status.

put.description: Accept, ignore, or override a decision.

schema.title: Response Update Decision Action Api V1 Decisions  Decision Id  Action Put

get.description: Liveness probe — process is up and serving requests.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get
Response Ready Api V1 Ready Get

get.description: Get system status with data freshness info.
Log tail — last N lines from most recent orchestrator log. 10s cached.
Roadmap — parsed roadmap.yaml joined with state.db. 10s cached.
Liveness probe — process is up and serving requests.
